{{Item
| image = Multicoloured collar.png
| id = multicoloured_collar
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Non-dyeable
| stackable = 64
}}

'''Multicolored Collar''' is a non-dyable equipable item that ''fabulizes'' your dog's collar.

[[File:Multicoloured collar display.png|frameless|606x606px]]

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe ''(shapeless)''
|-
| Wool Collar <br>+ Red Dye<br>+ Orange Dye<br>+ Yellow Dye<br>+ Blue Dye<br>+ Lime Dye<br>+ Purple Dye <br>+ String
| [[File:Multicoloured collar crafting.png]]
|}
== Usage ==
{{Accessory_use}}
== Trivia ==
It was added in the original Doggy Talents.
